title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 47.070 - Oath of county seat commissioners
text:
47.070.  Oath of county seat commissioners. — It shall be the duty of each commissioner, before entering upon the duties herein assigned him, to take an oath that he will faithfully perform the duties of commissioner, a certificate of which shall be endorsed on the paper evidencing his appointment.
(RSMo 1939 § 13737) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12078; 1919 § 9478; 1909 § 3699
